title: Native Pi TUI default worker proof
goal: Create one tiny evidence note proving that native Pi TUI workers are the default after promotion. The note must state that this run intentionally omitted --experimental-pi-tui-worker and that KD-owned submit_worker_result artifacts remain authoritative, not terminal text.
acceptance: Create docs/design/evidence/tui-worker-default-proof-2026-07-08.md stating that this default-promotion proof intentionally omitted --experimental-pi-tui-worker and that KD-owned submit_worker_result artifacts are authoritative, not terminal text.
